name: Youth Literacy Rate
description: Percentage of people aged 15-24 who can read and write a short simple statement about their everyday life
methodology: Household surveys and census data

name: Secondary School Net Enrollment Rate
description: Ratio of children of official secondary school age enrolled in secondary school to the total population of the official secondary school age
methodology: Administrative data from national education ministries

name: Tertiary Education Gross Enrollment Rate
description: Total enrollment in tertiary education regardless of age expressed as a percentage of the eligible official school-age population
methodology: Administrative data from higher education institutions

name: STEM Graduates as Share of Total Graduates
description: Percentage of tertiary graduates from science, technology, engineering, and mathematics programmes
methodology: Administrative data from higher education institutions

name: Youth Not in Education, Employment or Training (NEET)
description: Proportion of youth aged 15-24 not in education, employment, or training
methodology: Labour force surveys and household surveys

name: Primary Completion Rate
description: Total number of new entrants in the last grade of primary education regardless of age expressed as a percentage of the total population of the theoretical entrance age to the last grade of primary
methodology: Administrative data from national education ministries

name: Mean Years of Schooling
description: Average number of completed years of education of a country's population aged 25 years and older
methodology: Census and household survey data combined with education attainment distributions

name: Youth Unemployment Rate (15-24)
description: Share of the labor force aged 15-24 without work but available for and seeking employment
methodology: Labour force surveys using ILO standard definitions

name: Youth Labor Force Participation Rate
description: Proportion of youth population aged 15-24 that is economically active (employed or unemployed and seeking work)
methodology: Labour force surveys

name: Youth Self-Employment Rate
description: Percentage of employed youth aged 15-24 who are own-account workers or employers
methodology: Labour force surveys and establishment surveys

name: Informal Employment Rate
description: Proportion of total employment that is in the informal sector, including employment in unregistered enterprises and without social protection
methodology: Labour force surveys using the ILO conceptual framework for informal employment

name: Youth Entrepreneurship Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 18-34 who are either nascent entrepreneurs or owner-managers of new businesses
methodology: Adult Population Survey (APS) conducted annually across participating countries

name: Share of Youth in Wage Employment
description: Proportion of employed youth aged 15-24 in paid employment (wage and salaried workers)
methodology: Labour force surveys

name: Youth Working Poverty Rate
description: Percentage of employed youth aged 15-24 living below the international poverty line (USD 2.15/day PPP)
methodology: Labour force surveys combined with household income/expenditure surveys

name: Youth Mortality Rate (15-24)
description: Probability of dying between the ages of 15 and 24 per 1,000 youth population
methodology: Civil registration data, household surveys, and demographic models

name: Adolescent Fertility Rate
description: Number of births per 1,000 women aged 15-19
methodology: Civil registration systems, censuses, and household surveys (DHS, MICS)

name: HIV Prevalence Rate (15-24)
description: Percentage of people aged 15-24 who are living with HIV
methodology: Sentinel surveillance, population-based surveys, and epidemiological modelling (Spectrum/EPP)

name: Youth with Access to Healthcare
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-24 who report being able to access essential health services when needed
methodology: Household surveys including DHS and MICS

name: Stunting Prevalence (Under 5)
description: Percentage of children under 5 years whose height-for-age is more than two standard deviations below the WHO median
source: UNICEF / WHO / World Bank Joint Malnutrition Estimates
methodology: Nationally representative household surveys (DHS, MICS, national nutrition surveys)

name: Mental Health Service Coverage
description: Proportion of people with mental disorders who receive treatment, measured through mental health service utilization data
source: World Health Organization (WHO) Mental Health Atlas
methodology: National mental health information systems and facility-based surveys

name: Contraceptive Prevalence Rate (15-24)
description: Percentage of women aged 15-24 who are using or whose partners are using a contraceptive method
methodology: Demographic and Health Surveys (DHS) and Multiple Indicator Cluster Surveys (MICS)

name: Youth Voter Turnout
description: Percentage of registered voters aged 18-35 who cast ballots in the most recent national election
methodology: Electoral records disaggregated by age group

name: Youth Seats in Parliament
description: Percentage of members of parliament under the age of 35
methodology: Surveys of national parliaments and parliamentary records

name: Civil Society Organization Participation Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-35 who actively participate in civil society organizations or community groups
methodology: Nationally representative household surveys across African countries

name: Youth Trust in Government Index
description: Composite index measuring youth confidence in national government institutions on a scale of 0-100
methodology: Nationally representative face-to-face surveys measuring trust in institutions

name: Freedom of Association Score
description: Score measuring the extent to which citizens can freely form and join organizations on a scale of 0-1
methodology: Expert-coded assessments triangulated with factual data and validated through inter-coder reliability tests

name: Youth Political Participation Index
description: Composite measure of youth engagement across voting, campaigning, protests, and civic dialogue on a scale of 0-100
methodology: Composite index combining survey data and administrative records

name: Internet Penetration Rate
description: Percentage of the population using the internet
methodology: National administrative data from telecom regulators and household surveys

name: Mobile Cellular Subscriptions per 100
description: Number of active mobile cellular subscriptions per 100 inhabitants
methodology: Administrative data from telecommunications operators and regulators

name: Youth Digital Literacy Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-24 who have performed at least one of nine computer-related activities in the last three months
methodology: Household surveys measuring ICT skills based on the ITU ICT Skills Framework

name: Tech Startup Density per Million
description: Number of registered technology startups per million inhabitants
methodology: Startup ecosystem mapping and database tracking of tech ventures receiving funding

name: ICT Development Index
description: Composite index measuring ICT access, use, and skills on a scale of 0-10
methodology: Composite of 11 indicators covering ICT access, ICT use, and ICT skills dimensions

name: Mobile Broadband Subscriptions per 100
description: Number of active mobile broadband subscriptions per 100 inhabitants
methodology: Administrative data from telecommunications operators and regulators

name: Fixed Broadband Subscriptions per 100
description: Number of fixed broadband subscriptions per 100 inhabitants
methodology: Administrative data from telecommunications operators and regulators

name: Youth Employment in Agriculture
description: Percentage of employed youth aged 15-24 working in the agricultural sector
methodology: Labour force surveys using ISIC classification of economic activities

name: Youth Land Ownership Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-35 who own or have secure rights to agricultural land
methodology: Household surveys including LSMS-ISA and DHS land modules

name: Agricultural Productivity Index
description: Agricultural value added per worker in constant 2015 USD, indexed to continental average
methodology: National accounts data combined with employment estimates from labour force surveys

name: Agribusiness Youth Participation Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-35 engaged in agricultural value chain activities beyond primary production
methodology: Enterprise surveys and youth livelihood assessments

name: Food Security Index
description: Composite index measuring food affordability, availability, quality and safety, and natural resources and resilience on a scale of 0-100
methodology: Composite of quantitative and qualitative indicators weighted by expert assessment

name: Cereal Yield per Hectare
description: Cereal crop production per hectare of harvested land in kilograms
methodology: National agricultural statistics and production estimates

name: Gender Parity Index (Education)
description: Ratio of female to male gross enrollment rates at secondary and tertiary education levels
methodology: Administrative data from national education systems, calculated as female GER divided by male GER

name: Female Youth Unemployment Gap
description: Difference in percentage points between female and male youth unemployment rates (aged 15-24)
methodology: Labour force surveys with gender-disaggregated analysis

name: Female Labor Force Participation Rate
description: Proportion of female population aged 15+ that is economically active
methodology: Labour force surveys using ILO standard definitions

name: Women in STEM
description: Percentage of female graduates from STEM programmes at the tertiary level
methodology: Administrative data from higher education institutions disaggregated by field of study and sex

name: Adolescent Marriage Rate
description: Percentage of women aged 20-24 who were first married or in union before age 18
methodology: Demographic and Health Surveys (DHS) and Multiple Indicator Cluster Surveys (MICS)

name: Gender-Based Violence Prevalence
description: Percentage of women and girls aged 15-49 who have experienced physical or sexual violence by an intimate partner in the past 12 months
methodology: Nationally representative population-based surveys (DHS domestic violence module)

name: Maternal Mortality Ratio
description: Number of maternal deaths per 100,000 live births
methodology: Bayesian maternal mortality estimation model using civil registration, surveys, and census data

name: Youth Bank Account Ownership
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-24 who report having an account at a financial institution
methodology: Nationally representative surveys of approximately 1,000 adults per country conducted by Gallup

name: Mobile Money Account Penetration
description: Percentage of the population aged 15+ who have used a mobile money service in the past 12 months
source: World Bank Global Findex Database / GSMA
methodology: Nationally representative surveys combined with GSMA mobile money deployment tracker

name: Youth Access to Credit
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-24 who borrowed from a formal financial institution in the past year
methodology: Nationally representative household surveys

name: Youth Savings Rate
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-24 who saved money in the past 12 months at a financial institution or using a mobile money account
methodology: Nationally representative household surveys

name: Financial Literacy Rate
description: Percentage of adults who correctly answer at least three out of four financial literacy questions on risk diversification, inflation, numeracy, and compound interest
source: S&P Global FinLit Survey / World Bank
methodology: Nationally representative surveys using standardized financial literacy questions

name: Insurance Coverage Rate
description: Percentage of the adult population with at least one type of insurance policy (life, health, or agricultural)
source: Access to Insurance Initiative (A2ii) / World Bank
methodology: Insurance supervisor data and household surveys

name: Youth Engagement in Environmental Action
description: Percentage of youth aged 15-35 who have participated in environmental conservation or climate action activities in the past year
methodology: Nationally representative surveys and environmental participation assessments

name: Renewable Energy Access Rate
description: Share of the population with access to electricity from renewable energy sources
source: International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA) / World Bank
methodology: National energy statistics, household surveys, and geospatial electrification data

name: Green Jobs Share
description: Percentage of total employment in sectors classified as contributing to environmental sustainability
methodology: Labour force surveys cross-classified with environmental goods and services sector definitions

name: Carbon Emissions per Capita
description: Total carbon dioxide emissions from fossil fuels and cement production per capita in metric tonnes
methodology: National fossil fuel consumption data, cement production statistics, and population estimates

name: Environmental Education Coverage
description: Percentage of secondary schools with environmental education integrated into their curriculum
methodology: National curriculum reviews and school surveys on environmental and sustainability education

name: Climate Vulnerability Index
description: Composite index measuring a country's exposure, sensitivity, and adaptive capacity to climate change on a scale of 0-100
methodology: Composite of 45 indicators across food, water, health, ecosystem services, human habitat, and infrastructure sectors
